title: Unadjusted basis; inventories
doc_html:
§141.  Unadjusted basis; inventories

If the property should have been included in the last inventory, the basis shall be the last inventory value thereof.
doc_text:
§141.  Unadjusted basis; inventories
If the property should have been included in the last inventory, the basis shall be the last inventory value thereof.
